# Purrify

> Purrify makes activated carbon cat litter odor-control granules that reduce ammonia and litter box odors at the source.

This file provides a curated set of verified pages for LLM inference-time understanding of Purrify products, science, and customer support information.

## Core

- [Homepage](https://www.purrify.ca/)
- [Products](https://www.purrify.ca/products/)
- [Trial Size](https://www.purrify.ca/products/trial-size/)

- [Learn Hub](https://www.purrify.ca/learn/)

- [Ammonia Science](https://www.purrify.ca/learn/ammonia-science/)

- [Cat Litter Guide](https://www.purrify.ca/learn/cat-litter-guide/)
- [Safety](https://www.purrify.ca/learn/safety/)
